items.body_excerpt: Instant reaction is those picks are getting attached to Vando’s contract. Question is to free up space to sign someone (Rui,Kuminga,etc) or take money back in a trade with someone like Dalton or Jake going out. Wonder their swap and salary relief enough to get someone like Dort, Johnson, Washington?
